name: CSUF - College of Humanities and Social Sciences

episodes.title: The Hidden Dimensions of the Epstein Case
episodes.description: Dr. Siobhan Brooks unpacks the intersections of race, power, consent, and accountability through a deeper look at the Epstein files and the realities many women, especially Black women, have faced for decades. A powerful conversation on who is protected, who is ignored, and how systems continue to shape both.
